name: Coppermountain Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a pastry cutter to combine the butter, cream cheese, and flour until crumbly.
2. Press the mixture into a quiche dish and refrigerate.
3. Dredge the spinach in flour.
4. Combine all other ingredients with pieces of cream cheese in a separate bowl.
5. Pour the filling into the quiche shell.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
7. Broccoli may be substituted for spinach, and ham (1 cup) may be substituted for bacon, if desired.
